recommendations.title: Publish Comprehensive TCFD-Aligned ESG Report
recommendations.description: ICICI Bank should publish a detailed TCFD-aligned ESG report including Scope 3 financed emissions to improve ESG ratings and attract ESG-mandated foreign institutional investments, following SBI's lead.
recommendations.profitability_link: Attracting ₹3000 Cr in ESG FII inflows as SBI did can reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, potentially increasing valuation by 5-10%, equating to ₹500-700 Cr uplift.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published India's first bank-level TCFD report, achieving CDP B rating and ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Implement Enhanced ESG Data Management Systems
recommendations.description: Deploy advanced ESG data collection and management systems to ensure accurate, timely, and comprehensive ESG reporting aligned with GRI and ESRS standards.
recommendations.profitability_link: Accurate ESG data reduces risk of misreporting penalties and improves investor confidence, potentially avoiding ₹100-150 Cr in costs and improving valuation by ₹100 Cr.

recommendations.title: Enhance Quarterly ESG Disclosure and Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Implement enhanced quarterly ESG disclosures in line with SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report requirements to avoid regulatory penalties and improve transparency.
recommendations.framework_section: BRSR:P7, SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding SEBI penalties and trading restrictions can save ₹50-100 Cr in fines and cost of capital increases, ensuring stable investor confidence.

recommendations.title: Initiate Governance Reforms for ESG Narrative Differentiation
recommendations.description: Revise board oversight on ESG matters by establishing a dedicated ESG committee to strengthen governance and differentiate ICICI Bank’s ESG narrative in the market.
recommendations.framework_section: BRSR:P5, Dow Jones Sustainability Index Governance Criteria
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved governance can enhance ESG scores, potentially leading to a 5% valuation premium worth ₹200-300 Cr by attracting ESG-focused investors.

immediate_high.title: Implement Enhanced ESG Data Management Systems

immediate_low.title: Enhance Quarterly ESG Disclosure and Governance Reporting
Initiate Governance Reforms for ESG Narrative Differentiation
